---
title: "GitHub Pages Example"
format: html
---

## Course Lessons

-   [Intro to Quarto](scripts/intro-quarto.html)
-   Intro to git and [GitHub](https://github.com)
-   [Cleaning and Wrangling Data](cleaning & amp; wrangling data.html) 

## Practice Schedule

-   Practice I
-   Practice II


```{r}

```
